content: {"cards": [{"name": "Steadfast Sentinel", "mana_cost": "{2}{W}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["W"], "color_identity": ["W"], "type_line": "Creature \u2014 Human Soldier", "oracle_text": "", "flavor_text": "\"I stand where others fall. I endure where others break.\"", "power": "2", "toughness": "4", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Vanilla creature testing restraint. 2/4 for 3 mana is fair rate with defensive stats fitting white's philosophy. No abilities keeps complexity minimal while providing solid defensive body."}, {"name": "Dawnwing Protector", "mana_cost": "{1}{W}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["W"], "color_identity": ["W"], "type_line": "Creature \u2014 Bird Soldier", "oracle_text": "Flying", "flavor_text": "The morning light carries both hope and steel-sharp talons.", "power": "1", "toughness": "2", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Simple keyword-only creature. Flying is evergreen and fits white's color pie. 1/2 flying for 2 mana is appropriate common power level, providing evasive threat without being overpowered."}, {"name": "Divine Banishment", "mana_cost": "{1}{W}{W}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["W"], "color_identity": ["W"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Exile target creature. Its controller gains 3 life.", "flavor_text": "\"Your sins are forgiven, but your presence is no longer welcome.\"", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "White's primary removal at uncommon. Exile is white's preferred removal method. The lifegain compensation keeps it from being too efficient while staying in white's color pie. Double white in cost ensures color commitment."}, {"name": "Scholarly Insight", "mana_cost": "{1}{U}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["U"], "color_identity": ["U"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Draw a card, then scry 1.", "flavor_text": "Knowledge without understanding is merely trivia.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Classic blue cantrip design. Draw a card replaces itself, scry 1 adds minor card selection. This follows established templating for blue card draw effects at common, providing card advantage and library manipulation."}, {"name": "Arcane Disruption", "mana_cost": "{1}{U}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["U"], "color_identity": ["U"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Counter target spell unless its controller pays {2}.", "flavor_text": "\"Magic requires focus. Allow me to break yours.\"", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "Soft counterspell variant testing stack interaction. 'Unless its controller pays {2}' is standard templating for conditional counters. At uncommon, this provides accessible countermagic without being oppressive, giving opponents a way to pay through it."}]}
